common.copyright: Built with React & Tailwind · Made by Ali Sobouhi · © 2026

home.intro: As a Front-End Developer and Team Lead with 4+ years of professional experience, I specialize in building scalable, high-performance web applications. My focus lies in React, TypeScript, and modern state-management systems, delivering complex national-scale platforms like Iran's Ministry of Health portals. I bridge pixel-perfect UI designs with clean, component-based architectures.

resume.title: Resume
resume.subtitle: Discover my journey as a Team Lead and Senior Frontend Developer, specializing in scalable React & TypeScript web applications.

bullets: Directed and mentored a front-end development team across multiple simultaneous healthcare projects, conducting regular code reviews to maintain code quality, consistency, and long-term maintainability.
Architected scalable front-end solutions for national-scale healthcare platforms serving government ministries, medical centers, and private organizations across the country.
Established front-end development standards, reusable component libraries, and shared design patterns that accelerated delivery across all company projects.
Partnered closely with UI/UX designers using Figma and Adobe XD to transform wireframes into pixel-perfect, fully responsive interfaces.
Enforced role-based access control (RBAC) systems across multiple platforms, supporting distinct workflows for doctors, patients, administrators, and receptionists.

eduList.school: Islamic Azad University — Science & Research Branch, Tehran, Iran
Islamic Azad University — Tehran Branch, Tehran, Iran

portfolio.title: 📎 Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Unveiling the Art of Frontend: Explore my journey of architecting robust healthcare systems, telemedicine operations, and national-scale portals.

salam.title: Salam Operator — Ministry of Health National Healthcare Platform
salam.subtitle: National Telemedicine & Health Operator
desc: Directed the front-end team in designing and delivering one of Iran's three official national health operator platforms under the Ministry of Health.
Built a comprehensive telemedicine system featuring online medical consultations, video and text-based appointment scheduling, and integrated patient health record management.
Integrated real-time communication features and seamless third-party services for patient data synchronization at national scale.

payesh.title: Payesh — Occupational Health Monitoring System
payesh.subtitle: Multi-Tenant Enterprise Dashboard
desc: Guided the front-end team in architecting a multi-tenant occupational health monitoring platform serving organizations and medical centers through role-based dashboards with granular permission controls.
Engineered 30+ specialized medical form modules covering organ-specific evaluations, audiometry, spirometry, and lab panels — leveraging Redux Toolkit for cross-form state persistence.
Crafted multi-step onboarding wizards with dynamic form logic, cascading dependent dropdowns, and SMS-based verification flows.
Designed a contract management pipeline connecting organizations to accredited medical centers for structured employee health monitoring services.

picopet.title: PicoPet — Veterinary Healthcare Platform
picopet.subtitle: Bilingual Veterinary Portal
desc: Architected the front-end of a bilingual (Persian/English) pet healthcare platform connecting pet owners with veterinarians for online appointment scheduling, digital prescriptions, and vaccination tracking.
Shipped feature modules for clinic and doctor discovery, visit history management, invoice processing, and role-based dashboards for clients, doctors, and administrators.
Delivered full RTL/Persian internationalization support alongside a seamless LTR English interface.

pharmacy.title: Sepehr Online Pharmacy System
pharmacy.subtitle: Inventory & Order Management Portal
desc: Directed the front-end team in architecting a comprehensive pharmacy management platform currently operational across multiple active branches.
Engineered modules for drug inventory tracking including expired medication management, multi-insurance prescription processing workflows, and an online storefront.
Designed and executed dedicated high-performance interfaces for pharmacists and administrative staff.

salamat.title: Sepehr Salamat — Medical Center Management System
salamat.subtitle: Comprehensive Medical Office System
desc: Engineered core front-end services for healthcare centers including insurance-supported prescription workflows, appointment scheduling, and comprehensive patient record management.
Crafted dedicated, high-performance user panels tailored specifically for doctors, receptionists, and patients with distinct workflows per role.

contact.phoneSub: Call me or message on WhatsApp
contact.letsConnectSub: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
